title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: PORTLAND ADVENTIST COMMUNITY SERVICES THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a thrift store with clothing, luggage, handbags, books, sheet music, household goods, and furniture. Donations accepted on-site. 11020 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2:30pm, Sunday 11am-4pm Donation drop-off: Monday-Thursday 9am-1pm, Sunday 11am-2pm Closed major holidays Email (503) 252-8500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 252-8500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2:30pm, Sunday 11am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Cross-street on Halsey is 111th Avenue. Bus 77 stops outside agency, Bus 23 stops less than a block away. Gateway Transit Center is a 15-minute walk, with access to MAX Blue, Red, and Green lines and multiple bus lines. Services: Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
